_comment: CHANTER repo catalog for Release Operator P0. Mirrors CHANTER_PRODUCT_REGISTRY.md and CHANTER_SECURITY_GATES.md (those root docs are authoritative). chanterRoot is relative to this file's directory. Read-only scanning only — this config never authorizes push/deploy/publish/migration.
livePublishPhrase: I approve the controlled live publish test.
globalGates: No `git push` / force push (all repos) without approval
No TikTok/Instagram live publish without the exact approval phrase
No MCP `insert-p3b.js` / `insert-p3b.mjs` execution (one-time inserts already executed — re-run corrupts state)
No dependency installs/updates or lockfile churn without approval
No secret exposure: never print `.env` values or inspect credentials/tokens
No deletion/archive of tracked files without approval
No real trading integration (CryptoRadar is PAPER TRADING ONLY)

repos.name: chanter-auto-poster
approvalPending: Controlled live publish test — requires the exact approval phrase

repos.name: chanter-premium-site
approvalPending: Orphaned API routes (api/creator-kit.js, api/subtitle-engine.js) — secure or remove before any deploy that activates them

repos.name: chanter-mcp-server
approvalPending: Archive/delete insert-p3b.js / insert-p3b.mjs (landmine scripts at repo root — DO NOT RUN)

repos.name: chanter-loop.governor
approvalPending: default_agent decision: set to 'mock' OR deliberately enable codex (currently mismatched)

repos.name: chanter-Operator
repos.role: Control layer — operator console (local-only, no auth; must never be exposed)

repos.name: chanter-SafeCommit
repos.role: Control layer — commit-safety CLI (advisory scope by design)

repos.name: chanter-memory-vault
repos.role: Memory layer — durable memory vault CLI
blockedCommands: any mutation of memory/vault.sqlite outside the CLI's tested paths
schema changes (blocked until backup/migration/rollback docs exist)

repos.name: chanter-clean.engine
repos.role: Public product candidate — photo restoration engine (local dev)
blockedCommands: web exposure without prior security review

repos.name: chanter-crypto-radar
repos.role: Parked experiment — crypto radar (PAPER TRADING ONLY)
blockedCommands: deploy (vercel.json exists but no live evidence)

repos.name: CinemaForge
approvalPending: Archive 3 loose incident files in wrapper (P2)
